stemHtml: In a multi crew aircraft you have a Pilot Flying (PF) and a Pilot Monitoring (PM). What are the roles and responsibilities of each of the pilots?

options.a: PF flies the aircraft or monitors the autopilot, PM has some similar functions, other ancillary functions and operates the radios.
options.b: PF flies the aircraft or monitors the autopilot, PM has some similar functions, and other ancillary functions.
options.c: PM flies the aircraft or monitors the autopilot, PF has some similar functions and other ancillary functions.
options.d: PM flies the aircraft or monitors the autopilot, PF has some similar functions, other ancillary functions and operates the radios.
